title: On load, Paint mode shows the canvas stage with the floating toolbar and brush/palette controls
On load (or after opening Gallery), at least 4 seeded saved boards are visible with names
After saving/creating a board named 'Harbor Signal' with a valid name, the text 'Harbor Signal' is visible in Gallery
After adding 3 new boards on top of the seed set, Gallery shows exactly 3 more items than the initial seeded count
After loading a seeded board from Gallery, the paint canvas cells update to that board's snapshot
After editing a board name to 'Evening Grid', the text 'Evening Grid' is visible and the previous name is not
After deleting a board, that board name is no longer visible in Gallery
After deleting all boards, an empty state is visible in Gallery
After submitting save/create with an empty required board name, the boards count does not increase and validation feedback is visible
After filtering Gallery by a tag or favorites (with mixed items present), only matching boards remain visible
After switching between Paint and Gallery modes, the main canvas shows the other mode without full page navigation
When hovering toolbar buttons, swatches, or gallery rows, a visible hover wash or fill change appears
